changes: ValidateAtlasRecommendationClosureArtifacts now rejects command.status that disagrees with the current recommendation readback status.
ValidateAtlasRecommendationReconciliationPacket now requires blocked_stale_artifact when closure artifacts disagree and rejects blocked_stale_artifact when artifacts agree.
Final-state reconciliation can carry blocked_stale_artifact while ready nodes remain, but only through the stale-artifact validation path.
Added examples/invalid/recommendation-reconciliation-stale-command-status.json with command_readback_status=completed against an in_progress readback.
Added focused regression and production-readiness assertion for the stale Command fixture.
